articles.title: ALL
articles.summary: Developers are turning to ElevenLabs [5] to deploy lifelike voice agents at scale and are seeing unprecedented adoption. Their agents are built to:

articles.title: GEMINI 2.5 FLASH
articles.summary: The next Flash model from Gemini has been released. It is a substantial upgrade from previous versions and matches Claude on a number of important STEM benchmarks.

articles.title: CLAUDE CODE BEST PRACTICES
articles.summary: Anthropic has released a detailed engineering guide on how to use its agentic programming assistant. It requires more specificity than traditional models.

articles.title: OUR UPDATED PREPAREDNESS FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: OpenAI has updated its Preparedness Framework to enhance safety measures against severe risks from advanced AI capabilities. The revision emphasizes clear criteria for prioritizing high-risk capabilities, sharper capability categories, scalable evaluations, and defined safeguard reports. This framework will be continually updated in line with emerging technological advancements and insights from internal and external experts.

articles.title: FLEXIBLE IMAGE WATERMARKING
articles.summary: MaskMark provides a simple, dual-mode solution for global and local watermarking using a masking-based Encoder-Distortion-Decoder framework.

articles.title: SLEEP-TIME COMPUTE FOR LLM EFFICIENCY
articles.summary: A novel approach to reduce LLM inference costs by precomputing useful context-related quantities before user queries. It shows up to 5x test-time savings and accuracy gains on reasoning tasks.

articles.title: PERSONALIZED IMAGE SYNTHESIS WITH AUTO-REGRESSIVE MODELS
articles.summary: This paper explores the training auto-regressive models for personalized image generation to achieve comparable fidelity to diffusion-based methods through a two-stage optimization process.

articles.title: TRANSFORMING DATA INTO INSIGHTS WITH MULTIMODAL LLMS
articles.summary: Diverse data (images, text, audio) is notoriously difficult to analyze. HP's upcoming webinar [14] shows how multimodal large language models can help you integrate and analyze these different data formats more effectively. Whether you're new to multimodal analysis or looking to enhance your current methods, you'll learn to create real-world applications, this session will provide valuable strategies for making better data-driven decisions. Save your virtual

articles.title: ALIGNING LVMS WITH HUMAN PREFERENCES
articles.summary: VistaDPO improves video-text alignment by optimizing preference learning across spatial and temporal dimensions using a new 7.2K sample dataset and hierarchical optimization.

articles.title: HALLUCINATION REDUCTION IN VLMS
articles.summary: REVERSE introduces a training and inference pipeline that enables VLMs to self-detect and revise hallucinations.

articles.title: ZEROSUMEVAL BENCHMARK
articles.summary: A dynamic evaluation framework that uses competitive multi-agent simulations to benchmark LLMs across reasoning, knowledge, and planning tasks.

articles.title: GARMENT GENERATION
articles.summary: A new two-stage generative framework for clothing design that enables detailed control over silhouette, color, and logos. It also introduces GarmentBench, a large dataset for multi-conditional garment synthesis.

articles.title: GEMINI IMAGE SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: It is well known that Gemini's vision capabilities are quite good. This post explores one specific use case in segmentation which is surprisingly easy.

articles.title: SOUTH KOREA'S AI CHIP CHAMPION IS POISED TO CARVE OUT GLOBAL NICHE
articles.summary: Rebellions, South Korea's first AI chip unicorn, merged with SK Telecom's Sapeon to compete globally against giants like Nvidia. The company aims to produce energy-efficient AI chips - its Rebel chip promises significant power savings over Nvidia's H100. With support from top talent and strategic partnerships, Rebellions is targeting international growth and plans to IPO by 2026.

articles.title: LTXV DISTILLED 0.9.6 VIDEO MODEL (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: LTX video model is a state-of-the-art open video model.

articles.title: GENERATE VIDEOS IN GEMINI AND WHISK WITH VEO 2
articles.summary: Starting today, Gemini Advanced users can generate videos using the Veo 2 model, translating text-based prompts into high-resolution, cinematic videos.

articles.title: OPENAI HAS LAUNCHED THE CHATGPT IMAGE LIBRARY
articles.summary: OpenAI launched the ChatGPT Image Library on the Web and Android/iOS for Free, Plus, and Pro users.
